source_title: Aurora Acquisition Corp. Form 8-K/A (Amendment No. 1), restating audited balance sheet as of March 8, 2021
document_type: Form 8-K/A amending and restating a previously filed audited balance sheet (non-reliance/restatement disclosure)
primary_pressure: Distinguish the cause of the restatement (multiple accounting-classification errors) from its scope/consequence (no impact on cash). Includes an off-axis true 'no cash impact' hypothesis.
notes: Causal driver is over-determined: three independent classification errors plus an audit-committee non-reliance conclusion and an SEC-staff-guidance trigger. No single-row removal changes the read.
